industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: China National Nuclear Power Co., Ltd.
summary: China National Nuclear Power Co., Ltd. invests in, develops, constructs, operates, and manages nuclear power projects in the People's Republic of China. The company also provides nuclear power project related technical and consultancy services. It operates 14 nuclear power units with an installed capacity of 11,512 MWe. The company is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China. China National Nuclear Power Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of China National Nuclear Corporation.
